articles.title: IP address collection
articles.desc: A new option lets you toggle on/off the IP address collection on confirmation and subscription.

articles.title: Delay statistics recording
articles.desc: A new option lets you configure a delay during which the statistics are not recorded.

splash_content.title: THE FIXES INCLUDED IN THIS VERSION

articles.title: Access rights reset
articles.desc: The access rights could be reset when a user is granted access to the configuration and modifies it.

articles.title: Monthly campaigns
articles.desc: We fixed the next execution time calculation for monthly automations and monthly automatic campaigns that could be shifted by timezone.

articles.title: Community Builder list management
articles.desc: Lists are now properly displayed in the Community Builder user management when creating a new user.

articles.title: Subscription form security
articles.desc: Security has been improved on the subscription form options.

articles.title: WooCommerce filter display
articles.desc: Fix the display of WooCommerce products and categories filters in automations, segments and follow-ups.
